problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to —, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
